prompt: Create an ERC-20 token in my SE-2 project with capped supply, minting restricted to the owner, and a frontend page to mint and transfer tokens.
assertions: Uses OpenZeppelin v5 ERC-20 contract with ERC20Capped extension
Minting is restricted to owner (onlyOwner modifier or equivalent access control)
Constructor uses Ownable(msg.sender) pattern (v5, not parameterless Ownable())
Frontend page includes mint functionality (owner can mint tokens)
Frontend page includes transfer functionality (send tokens to another address)
Proper Hardhat deploy script exists in packages/hardhat/deploy/
Uses SE-2 hooks (useScaffoldReadContract/useScaffoldWriteContract) for contract interaction
Handles token decimals correctly in frontend (formatUnits/parseUnits or formatEther/parseEther)
Contract compiles successfully with valid Solidity syntax
Cap is enforced (cannot mint beyond max supply)
